macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stocks Rally as Oil Prices Tumble 15% on Trump's Hint at Swift End to Iran War
items.summary: Major US indices closed higher on March 10: Dow Jones up 0.7%, S&P 500 up 0.6%, Nasdaq up 0.6-1.38%, recovering from earlier losses amid de-escalation signals. Oil futures plunged up to 15%, easing inflation pressures ahead of key CPI and PCE data this week.

items.title: S&P 500 Experiences Volatile Session, Dips to 6760 Before Rallying 62 Points
items.summary: S&P 500 opened at 6800, dropped to 6760, then rallied strongly, with pullbacks continuing to attract buyers despite weakening momentum and breadth signals. Technology led gains at 1.8%, followed by healthcare and industrials.

items.title: Global Markets Rise on 10% Oil Drop, Boosting Equities and Emerging Markets
items.summary: Oil fell 10-10.45%, driving gains in global indices including Dow futures +0.42%, S&P 500 futures +0.44%, Nasdaq +0.53%, Ibovespa +1.61%, and other Latin American markets. Brazilian real strengthened to R$5.14 low.

items.title: Oracle Earnings Due After Close, Adobe on Thursday Amid Semiconductor Strength
items.summary: Oracle (ORCL) reports earnings post-market on March 10, Adobe (ADBE) on March 12; Philly Chip index outperforms up 5% recently, while software lags.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: SBVA Invests €30 Million in Yann LeCun's AMI for World Models
items.summary: SBVA has committed €30 million in seed funding to Advanced Machine Intelligence (AMI), founded by AI pioneer Yann LeCun, to develop next-generation 'world models' using self-supervised learning and JEPA for practical intelligence in manufacturing and robotics.

items.title: USC Study: AI Model Teaches Itself to Achieve 96% Accuracy Beyond Training Data
items.summary: A new USC Viterbi research paper accepted at IEEE SoutheastCon 2026 demonstrates an AI method that recompiles and retries to dramatically improve performance on untrained tasks, reaching 96% accuracy.

items.title: MIT Develops VLMFP: Twice as Effective for Complex Visual Task Planning
items.summary: MIT researchers introduce VLMFP, a generative AI framework using vision-language models for long-term visual planning like robot navigation, achieving 60-80% success rates and strong generalization.

items.title: UC San Diego Unveils Zephyrus AI Agent for Weather and Climate Analysis
items.summary: Researchers at UC San Diego created Zephyrus, an AI agent that translates natural language queries into code for weather models, aiding analysis of forecasts and reports with plans for climate expansion.

items.title: UK Supreme Court Considers Patentability of Artificial Neural Networks
items.summary: The UK Supreme Court is examining whether inventions based on artificial neural networks can be patented, addressing key questions in AI intellectual property.

items.title: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong on AI Agents Needing Crypto Wallets
items.summary: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong highlights limitations of AI agents in accessing bank accounts and promotes 'agentic wallets' as the solution for autonomous payments.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Bungie Confirms Marathon Release in March 2026 at $40
items.summary: Bungie and PlayStation announced that the extraction shooter Marathon will launch in March 2026 for $40, featuring improvements like proximity chat and solo modes following alpha feedback and a delay from September 2025.

items.title: Monster Hunter Stories 3 Achieves Highest Series Rating on OpenCritic
items.summary: Capcom's Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection scores 85% on OpenCritic, surpassing previous entries and marking it as the highest-rated game in the Stories spin-off series ahead of its March 13 release.

items.title: Pre-Registration Opens Globally for hololive Dreams Mobile Game
items.summary: COVER Corporation announced pre-registration for hololive Dreams, the first official hololive mobile game featuring over 50 VTubers, revealed at hololive SUPER EXPO 2026.

items.title: DDO Scheduled for Update 78.1 Downtime on March 11
items.summary: Dungeons & Dragons Online servers will be down from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM Eastern on March 11 for Update 78.1 deployment.

items.title: LOTRO Maintenance and Update 47.1 Downtime Announced
items.summary: Lord of the Rings Online worlds will be unavailable from 9:00 AM to 2:00 PM Eastern on March 11 for maintenance and Update 47.1 release.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Amazon Launches Massive $37 Billion Bond Sale for AI Infrastructure
items.summary: Amazon is raising at least $37 billion through one of the largest corporate bond offerings to fund AI infrastructure expansion, attracting $126 billion in investor demand. This reflects a broader trend among tech giants shifting to debt financing amid surging AI investments projected to exceed $600 billion in 2026.

items.title: Apple Releases iOS 26.4 Beta 4 to Developers and Public Testers
items.summary: Apple has rolled out iOS 26.4 Beta 4, available to both developers and public testers, marking a significant update in its ongoing software development cycle.

items.title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Beats Sales Forecasts on AI Hardware Demand
items.summary: HPE CEO Antonio Neri reported sales forecasts topping estimates, driven by strong demand for AI hardware, highlighting continued growth in enterprise tech infrastructure.

items.title: Data Center Cooling Demands Could Require $10-58 Billion in New Water Infrastructure
items.summary: A UC Riverside study warns that surging data center needs for cooling, fueled by cloud computing growth, may necessitate $10-58 billion in U.S. waterworks upgrades to handle peak demands.

items.title: Coinbase Expands Agentic Wallets on x402 Protocol
items.summary: Coinbase's Agentic Wallets, launched on the x402 protocol for machine-to-machine payments, have processed over 50 million transactions and support gasless trading on its Base network.
